docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BERENSTEIN, SIDNEY SUBSTITUTED FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT AS ATTORNEY FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT
ORDER OF AUGUST 16, 1999, IN DEPT. 304, THE PARTIES HAVING STIPULATED IN OPEN COURT, AND PURSUANT TO SAID STIPULATION - GRANTED - JUDGE STUART R. POLLAK. SEE ORDER FOR DETAILS.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT EVANS, RONALD
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT EVANS, RONALD

JUDGE: STUART R. POLLAK; CLERK: ANDREA CARNEY; REPORTER: LELAND BATARA; DEPT 304; ASSIGNED FROM DEPT ONE FOR JURY TRIAL. CASE SETTLED. DEFT SHALL PAY TO THE PLTF THE SUM OF $520.00 ON AUG 17, 1999 AND AUG 31, 1999 AND THE SUM OF $390.00 ON SEPT. 14, 1999 AND SEPT. 28, 1999. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. IF DEFT FAILS TO MAKE PAYMENTS IN 3 DAYS OF DUE DATE, PLTF MAY SEEK WRIT OF POSSESSION.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE JURY TRIAL OF AUG-16-1999 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT EVANS, RONALD
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, RONALD SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-10-1999 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-16-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 304 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE PRO TEM: IRVING PFEFFER/CLERK: ECLAVERIA C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF AND CSL BERENSTEIN PRESENT. DEFT PRESENT AND REPRESENTING HERSELF. CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
